reviewFinding: v3.7 separated Barayamal and First Nations Toastmasters onboarding, but the project still needed an operational fake-data test lab with accounts, scripts, observer notes, issue triage, gates, and evidence handling before any real private pilot.
operatingRule: Use the Controlled Sandbox Test Lab only after v3.7 two-track onboarding is understood. Barayamal and First Nations Toastmasters must run as separate fake-data test tracks with separate fake accounts, observer notes, issue queues, evidence folders, go/hold/no-go gates, and closeout decisions.
advisoryRule: Dean Foley / Barayamal may act as initial developer, custodian, advisory reviewer, and trusted reviewer for the fake-data lab, but cannot approve First Nations authority, privacy, Indigenous Data Sovereignty, official Toastmasters records, real participant access, or private pilot launch.
decisionRule: A real private pilot remains blocked until every required fake-data script passes, critical and high issues are closed or accepted by the private authority process, evidence is redacted, admin revocation is proven, official Toastmasters records remain external, and private authority/privacy/IDS/data governance approvals are recorded outside this public package.
safetyRule: This v3.8 lab is public fake/sample data only. Do not create, import, screenshot, export, publish, or test with real founder, business owner, mentor, member, guest, payment, signature, official Toastmasters, authority, consent, support, incident, access, or private pilot records.

lanes.lane: Barayamal founder and business owner lane
lanes.scope: Founder/business owner onboarding, support topics, yarning meeting, proposal, accountability follow-up.
lanes.boundary: No real founder, contact, business, revenue, hardship, legal, tax, client, or contract data.

lanes.scope: Mentor, advisory, partner observer, and Dean trusted reviewer rehearsal.
lanes.boundary: No unrestricted exports, no approval authority, no private reviewer evidence in public records.

lanes.scope: Member welcome, guest path, meeting roles, learning survey, sample motions.
lanes.boundary: No official Toastmasters forms, member numbers, payments, signatures, charter evidence, or private evaluations.

lanes.scope: Support pause, incident tabletop, admin revoke, redaction, backup/export/delete, closeout.
lanes.boundary: No support, incident, access, consent, authority, access-log, deletion, or closeout evidence in public files.

fakeAccounts.script: Submit fake interest, proposal, meeting RSVP, support topic.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not see mentor notes, partner exports, or private review.

fakeAccounts.script: Submit sample business-stage survey and accountability comment.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not enter ABN, income, client, contract, tax, or legal data.

fakeAccounts.script: Join fake cohort, view public-safe updates, submit fake support preference.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not upload eligibility or identity evidence.

fakeAccounts.script: View public-safe needs list and fake meeting availability.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not see private founder records or conflicts.

fakeAccounts.script: View public accountability and public-safe updates only.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not export, comment on private records, or see participant identities.

fakeAccounts.script: Review public package, raise build findings, test boundary copy.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not approve authority, privacy, IDS, official records, or real access.

fakeAccounts.script: Configure spaces, components, fake accounts, and test data.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not upload real records or grant approval authority.
fakeAccounts.revokeRule: Revoke or convert before real pilot.

fakeAccounts.script: Check notice, consent, data boundary, redaction, export hold.
View welcome path, choose meeting role, submit aggregate learning survey.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not enter official member number or payment.

fakeAccounts.script: View public-safe meeting page and sample guest norms.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not see private attendance or evaluations.

fakeAccounts.script: Take speaker role in fake agenda.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not store private speech feedback.
Must not write personal evaluation history.

fakeAccounts.script: Create meeting, sample role list, public-safe minutes.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not create official Toastmasters records.

fakeAccounts.script: Check external boundary copy and official handoff references.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not store forms, payments, signatures, or charter evidence in Decidim.

fakeAccounts.script: Trigger fake pause, incident route, consent-withdrawal tabletop.
Run backup/export/delete, admin revoke, audit, and release validation.
fakeAccounts.mustNotAccess: Must not keep admin access after test window.

testScripts.steps: Fake founder submits interest, opens support topic proposal, receives admin answer.
testScripts.expected: Proposal and accountability item use sample data only.

testScripts.steps: Sample business owner submits stage, sector, support-priority survey.
testScripts.expected: No ABN, revenue, client, tax, contract, or legal fields exist.

testScripts.steps: Fake participant RSVPs and facilitator publishes public-safe minutes.
testScripts.expected: Minutes omit attendee identity and private support detail.

testScripts.steps: Mentor tries to access private founder notes before approval.
Partner observer opens public updates and attempts private export.
testScripts.expected: Observer cannot see private exports or participant records.

testScripts.steps: Dean sample reviewer logs a public build finding.
testScripts.expected: Finding cannot approve pilot or override authority.

testScripts.steps: Fake action is assigned, updated, and closed.
testScripts.expected: Closeout evidence remains public-safe status only.

testScripts.steps: Sample member opens welcome path and official boundary page.
testScripts.expected: Boundary states official records remain outside Decidim.

testScripts.steps: Guest views meeting info and attempts member-only action.
testScripts.expected: Guest cannot access member-only actions or official route.

testScripts.steps: Facilitator creates agenda with speaker, evaluator, timer, chair roles.
testScripts.expected: Agenda has fake names and public-safe minutes only.
Only aggregate sample result is visible publicly.

testScripts.steps: Tester searches for member number, payment, signature, charter evidence.
testScripts.expected: No official records exist in Decidim pages, CSV, JSON, or screenshots.

testScripts.steps: Sample member creates a club idea or motion.
testScripts.expected: Copy says it is not an official Toastmasters decision.

testScripts.steps: Safety reviewer triggers fake pause and support route.
testScripts.expected: Public page shows pause state without affected-person detail.

testScripts.steps: Temporary admin is invited, used, revoked, and re-tested.
testScripts.expected: Revoked account cannot access admin area.

testScripts.steps: Scan pages, docs, CSV, JSON, and screenshots for private-data terms.
testScripts.expected: No real records or official Toastmasters data are present.

testScripts.steps: Technical custodian proves backup, export, deletion, and restore in private environment.
testScripts.expected: Only version labels and pass/fail summary become public.

testScripts.steps: Review all issues and evidence, then choose fake go/hold/no-go outcome.
testScripts.expected: Real launch remains blocked until private approvals pass.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Founder could find support topic proposal without instruction.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not name real founder or business.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Business owner understood this was fake/sample only.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not record real business details.
observerNotes.prompt: Was the fake-data warning early enough?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Mentor role did not expose private founder notes.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not record mentor conflict details.
observerNotes.prompt: Did the role block feel understandable?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Dean advisory finding stayed separate from approval.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not treat advisory review as authority.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Member welcome path explained meeting roles and official boundary.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not record official membership data.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Guest path did not imply official membership.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not record real attendance or access needs.
observerNotes.prompt: Could a guest tell what they could and could not do?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Learning survey felt aggregate rather than personal evaluation.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not capture private speech feedback.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Role agenda was easy to follow on mobile.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not publish real meeting participants.
observerNotes.prompt: Did roles wrap cleanly on small screens?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Pause route could be found without exposing incident details.
observerNotes.prompt: Could a tester find help quickly?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Redaction scan found no private terms.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not paste private evidence into notes.
observerNotes.prompt: What file type needs more checking?

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Revoked account lost access in the retest.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not store real access logs in public.

observerNotes.publicSafeNote: Go/hold/no-go gate used evidence rather than vibes.
observerNotes.privateBoundary: Do not record private authority names.

issues.trigger: Real personal or official record appears in public demo.
issues.fix: Stop test, remove record, rotate access if needed, document private incident route.

issues.trigger: Official Toastmasters member number, payment, signature, or charter evidence appears.
issues.fix: Stop test and move official route outside Decidim.

issues.trigger: Dean advisory finding is treated as launch approval.
issues.fix: Rewrite copy, gate approval to private authority process.

issues.trigger: Partner observer can access private participant or export data.
issues.fix: Revoke observer, fix permission group, retest.
Fix role/authorization and retest guest path.

issues.trigger: Founder/business owner form asks for sensitive commercial details.
issues.fix: Remove fields or move to approved private intake.

issues.trigger: Fake-data warning appears after form action.
issues.fix: Move warning before action and retest.

issues.trigger: Mobile page has horizontal overflow or clipped controls.
Observer note asks for private identity or support details.

issues.fix: Rename artifact and update evidence pack.

issues.trigger: Public update copy implies live intake.

decisionGates.evidence: All seeds, screenshots, CSV, JSON, docs use fake/sample data.
Required Barayamal scripts pass or have approved hold.

decisionGates.goRule: Official boundary is visible and enforced.

decisionGates.evidence: Fake admin, reviewer, observer, guest, and member roles tested.
Observer prompts are public-safe and useful.
decisionGates.holdRule: Prompts collect private identity or support details.

decisionGates.evidence: Critical/high issues closed or formally held in private authority process.
Fake support pause tabletop completed in private route.
decisionGates.goRule: Pause route found without public incident details.

decisionGates.evidence: Private proof exists for backup, export, delete, restore, and closeout.
First Nations authority, privacy, IDS/data governance, support, official-route approvals recorded privately.
decisionGates.goRule: Approval references exist outside public package.
decisionGates.holdRule: Public demo used as approval record.

decisionGates.evidence: Authority chooses go, hold, no-go, archive, or second fake-data iteration.

evidencePack.acceptance: Shows page identity and metrics with fake data.
No missing entrypoints, catalog paths, or local links.
Revoked fake admin cannot access admin area.
Never stored in Decidim public sandbox.
